source.caption: Épure : projections d'un triangle ABC et de son sommet S, avec les rabattements autour de la charnière et la trace.

notes: Sideways plate (rotation 90): horizontal ligne de terre V/H at y~213; recall lines are vertical, so each point's V and H projection share an abscissa.
V-projection tetrahedron A^V C^V B^V S^V (thick quad + diagonals S^V-C^V solid, A^V-B^V dashed hidden); H-projection tetrahedron A^H B^H C^H S^H drawn below. Paired via the four drawn rappel lines.
C carries the largest recall drift (~8px along the LT): C^V x=489 vs C^H x=498 — hand-drawn plate noise, left as-read, not nudged.
Rabattus (B^H', C^H', A^H', S^V', S_2, S'), the plane trace pi^V'/(Delta ABC)^V' and the charnière/oblique construction lines are omitted from the lift per point_projection scope.
